A '''skirmish''' occurred between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces and [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dinlo]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].

[[Sarlacc Battalion A|Sarlacc A]] and [[Sarlacc Battalion B|B Battalions]], under the command of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Vaas Ga]] and [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Gree (clone trooper)/Legends|Gree]], were caught behind enemy lines on Dinlo and needed evacuation. [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|RAS]] ''[[Fearless]]'' with [[General/Legends|General]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] arrived bringing [[Improcco Company]] to extract them.

There were numerous casualties on both sides. The Separatist losses were [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] and [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]]. Improcco Company suffered mild losses; 4 were killed in action, and fifteen were wounded. Sarlacc [[Battalion/Legends|battalions]] A and B suffered worse; 94 were killed in action and 215 were wounded.

==Behind the scenes==
The skirmish was originally set 367 standard days after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], but ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' later moved ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] to fit with ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}}
